fields.name: Dimension Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the dimension that the dimension value filter will be linked to. To select a dimension codes, which are set up in the Dimensions window, click the drop-down arrow in the field.

fields.name: Dimension Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the dimension value that the dimension value filter will be linked to. To select a value code, which are set up in the Dimensions window, choose the drop-down arrow in the field.
